mapper.insert: insert into t_post_category(post_id, category_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{postId},#{categoryId},NOW(),NOW())

INSERT INTO t_post_category (post_id, category_id, create_time, update_time) SELECT #{postId}, #{categoryId}, NOW(), NOW() FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_post_category WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND category_id = #{categoryId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_post_category SET category_id = #{categoryId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
